# The Intervention Network — Full Documentation

> Trusted Interventionists. Zero Referral Fees. One Mission.

## Overview

The Intervention Network is a vetted national network of addiction interventionists founded by Matt Brown. Unlike directories or marketplaces, this is a curated professional alliance where families find trusted, vetted interventionists and interventionists gain visibility through ethical, referral-fee-free membership.

## Mission

Connect families in crisis with personally vetted addiction interventionists across all 50 states, without the referral fees and kickbacks that plague the addiction treatment industry.

## How It Works (For Families)

1. **Tell Us About Your Situation** — A brief intake form captures location, substance/behavior concern, and urgency level.
2. **We Match You With Vetted Professionals** — Our team reviews your needs and connects you with 1-2 interventionists based on geography, specialty, and fit.
3. **Your Family Gets Help** — Direct connection with the interventionist. No middleman fees. No commissions.

## Membership Tiers (For Interventionists)

### Listed — $199/month
- Professional profile on the website
- Included in family matching
- Network member badge/seal
- Listed in national directory
- Access to member resources

### Featured — $399/month
- Everything in Listed, plus priority placement, homepage rotation, newsletter spotlight, video introduction, quarterly analytics

### Partner — $599/month
- Everything in Featured, plus co-branded content, podcast appearances, lead flow dashboard, training library, priority founder consultation

## Vetting Requirements
- Minimum 3 years active intervention experience
- Recognized certification (BRI-I, BRI-II, ARISE, CIP, or equivalent)
- Personal or professional references
- Commitment to ethical, referral-fee-free practice
- Liability insurance
- Vetting interview with network founder

## Founder

**Matt Brown** — Addiction interventionist with 20+ years of experience and 22 years of personal recovery. Also the founder of Freedom Interventions (freedominterventions.com) and the Sober Helpline (soberhelpline.com). Host of the Party Wreckers podcast.

## The Referral Fee Problem

Most referral services in the addiction treatment industry operate on commission models, receiving $1,000-$50,000 per client placement. This creates conflicts of interest where families are sent to whichever facility pays the highest commission rather than the best fit. The Intervention Network eliminates this entirely — members pay a flat monthly fee, and no money changes hands when families are matched.

## Coverage

Interventionists across all 50 states with specialties including:
- Substance Use
- Adolescent
- Executive/Professional
- Eating Disorders
- Process Addiction/Gambling
- Mental Health Co-occurring
- Elderly/Senior
